_readme: Copy to HK_DATA_DIR/hk-guard.json (default data/hk-bot/). HK loads this with mtime caching. Honeypot quarantine is intentionally conservative: it applies a role and logs; it does not ban.

honeypot._note: Point channelIds at hidden/tempting channels spambots can see during onboarding. Fresh accounts that post here can be quarantined.

labyrinth._note: entryRoleId is applied on join; verifiedRoleIds are documented for operator workflows and future verification panels.

welcome.message: Statement: $mention has entered $server. Proceed through the onboarding labyrinth, meatbag.
